anemia_pattern.description: Low Hemoglobin levels indicating potential anemia.

infection_inflammation_pattern.description: Elevated WBC or CRP supporting an infection or inflammation review pattern.

thrombocytopenia_concern.description: Low platelet count requiring clinician review.

platelet_elevation_concern.description: Elevated platelet count requiring clinician review.

hyperglycemia_pattern.description: Elevated glucose or HbA1c supporting a hyperglycemia review pattern.

kidney_dysfunction_pattern.description: Elevated creatinine supporting a kidney-function review pattern.

thyroid_imbalance_pattern.description: Abnormal TSH supporting a thyroid-function review pattern.

lipid_abnormality_pattern.description: Elevated LDL or low HDL supporting a lipid review pattern.

cardiac_injury_marker_concern.description: Elevated troponin requiring prompt clinician review in context.

muscle_injury_marker_concern.description: Elevated CPK requiring clinician review in context.

electrolyte_imbalance_pattern.description: Abnormal sodium or potassium supporting an electrolyte review pattern.

calcium_abnormality_pattern.description: Abnormal calcium requiring clinician review in context.

hypoalbuminemia_concern.description: Low albumin requiring clinician review in context.
